question: Will a full-scale military conflict between the US/Israel and Iran resume by May 31, 2026?
reason: Ongoing diplomatic negotiations and recent U.S.
evidence: U.S. military conducted 'self-defense' airstrikes in southern Iran on May 25, 2026, targeting missile launch sites and boats. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/01a13e9a63ece786a0a7fa4933dbf09b?utm_source=openai))

President Trump announced on May 23, 2026, that a deal to end the war with Iran would be finalized 'shortly,' with final negotiations underway. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/23/us-iran-trump-deal-war?utm_source=openai))
